source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/03_제품별 인증서 & 성적서/2. 제품별 성적서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW, HAD1717MCW)/1. IEC 60601-1 외/NK-23-E-0903(REP016785_H&abyz Co., Ltd._ADD)_CE(4.1th)_TRF EMC.pdf

document.title: TEST REPORT IEC 60601-1-2
document.revisionOrVersion: Report Number REP016785; TRF template IECEE OD-2020-F1:2020, Ed.1.3

sourceSummary.oneLine: Nemko Korea EMC test report REP016785 for H&abyz ADD, HAD1717MCW, and HAD1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detectors under IEC 60601-1-2.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory evidence for electromagnetic emissions and immunity compliance testing of the listed medical electrical equipment models.
keyPoints: The test item is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model/type references ADD, HAD1717MCW, and HAD1417MCW.
Emission and immunity verdict summary entries are marked Pass for applicable IEC 60601-1-2 referenced tests.
Intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children; not for mammography or direct cardiac application.
The intended environment is professional healthcare facility environment.

concepts.name: IEC 60601-1-2 EMC collateral standard
concepts.evidence: Medical electrical equipment – Part 1-2: General requirements for basic safety and essential performance – Collateral Standard: ELECTROMAGNETIC disturbances – Requirements and tests

concepts.name: Electromagnetic emissions testing
concepts.evidence: Tests performed: Conducted emission, Radiated RF emission, Harmonic distortion, Voltage fluctuations and flicker

concepts.name: Electromagnetic immunity testing
concepts.evidence: Tests performed: Electrostatic discharges, Radiated RF EM fields, Proximity fields from RF wireless communications equipment, Electrical fast transients / burst, Surges, Conducted disturbances induced by RF fields, Rated power frequency magnetic fields, Voltage dips, Voltage interruptions, Proximity magnetic fields

concepts.name: Professional healthcare facility environment
concepts.evidence: Intended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment

concepts.name: Basic safety and essential performance
concepts.evidence: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows.

concepts.name: CISPR 11 Class A
concepts.evidence: Requirements applicable to ME EQUIPMENT and ME SYSTEMS classified class A according to CISPR 11

evidence.claim: The report date of issue is 2024-07-19.
Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. prepared the report and acted as CB Testing Laboratory.
evidence.evidenceText: Name of Testing Laboratory preparing the Report: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.; CB Testing Laboratory: Nemko Korea Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The applicant and manufacturer are H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Applicant’s name: H&abyz Co., Ltd.; Manufacturer: H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The tested product is a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Test item description: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The model/type references are ADD, HAD1717MCW, and HAD1417MCW.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The test specification standards are IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020.

evidence.evidenceText: The product fulfils the requirements of IEC 60601-1-2:2014 and EN 60601-1-2:2015 IEC 60601-1-2:2014/AMD1:2020 and EN 60601-1-2:2015/A1:2021

evidence.claim: The test item is classified for portable installation and use.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of installation and use: Portable

evidence.claim: The intended environment is professional healthcare facility environment.
evidence.evidenceText: Intended ENVIRONMENT Professional healthcare facility environment

evidence.claim: The intended use is general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-Ray Detector is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The product is not to be used for mammography or direct cardiac application.
evidence.evidenceText: Not to be used for mammography and direct cardiac application.
evidence.pageTarget: ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Intended Use

evidence.claim: Applicable emission tests in the verdict summary passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2 referenced emission standards ... Terminal disturbance voltages ... P; Radiation disturbance ... P; AC-Mains Harmonics ... P; AC-Mains Voltage fluctuations and flicker ... P

evidence.claim: Applicable immunity tests in the verdict summary passed.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60601-1-2 referenced immunity standards ... ELECTROSTATIC DISCHARGE ... P; Radiated RF EM fields ... P; Electrical fast transients / bursts ... P; Surges ... P; Conducted disturbances induced by RF fields ... P; RATED power frequency magnetic fields ... P; Voltage dips ... P; Voltage interruptions ... P; IMMUNITY to proximity fields from RF wireless communications equipment ... P; Immunity to proximity magnetic fields ... P

evidence.claim: The essential performance criteria included normal operation, consistent DC power from power solution 1 or 2, normal manufacturer program operation, and acquisition image obtained as intended.
evidence.evidenceText: The essential performance for Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector during EMC test was defined as follows. - Operation normally when operation is required - DC power is consistently supplied from Power solution #1 or #2 when EMC test is performed. - When connected to Power solution #1 or #2, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally. - Acquisition image is obtained as intended.

evidence.claim: Date of receipt of the test item was 2023-09-11.
evidence.evidenceText: Date of receipt of test item: 2023-09-11
Date(s) of performance of tests: 2023-10-22 to 2023-11-30

reviewFlags.reason: The source states the report is not valid as a CB Test Report unless signed by an approved IECEE Testing Laboratory and appended to a CB Test Certificate issued by an NCB, but no CB Test Certificate or named issuing NCB is present in the provided text.
Authority is represented by Nemko Korea Co., Ltd. as testing laboratory and IECEE System as TRF/copyright framework; jurisdictional regulatory authority is not explicitly identified.
Pages 118 through 264 contain only page headers in the provided preprocessed text, so later-page technical content may be missing from OCR/extraction.
